name: Miglior Cat Food Pouch Chicken & Turkey 100g
shortDescription: (4 pieces minimum order) Formula designed to guarantee the key nutrients required for the well-being of your cat, including vitamins, Omega 3, calcium and phosphorous to support strong bones and teeth, healthy skin and glossy coat, and toned musculature.
description: COMPOSITION: Meat and animal derivatives 30% (chicken 5%, turkey 5%), cereals, minerals. ANALYTICAL CONSTITUENTS: Moisture 75%, Crude protein 8,0%, Crude fat 4,5%, Crude fibres 0,5%, Crude ash 3%. Nutritional additives/kg: Vitamin E 10 mg, Copper (Copper (II) sulphate pentahydrate) 2 mg. HOW TO USE: How to use: the product is ready to use. STORAGE INSTRUCTION: Store the product in a cool and dry place, avoiding direct sunlight. Once opened, store in refrigerator for 2-3 days.
